rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. KEN PAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Modify Stay Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 15, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT KENNETH PAGE's Motion To Modify Stay Of Action GRANTED for the sole purpose of "docketing an Order reflecting the Court's granting of Defendants' Motion to Enforce Settlement Written Settlement on November 13, 2014 in case CGC 10-201448, and entering a judgment of dismissal in this case against Kenneth Page, Vincent Leger and Buena Vista Park, LLC." Non-opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare orders and judgment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. KEN PAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Joinder And Joinder To Defendant Kenneth Pages Motion To Modify Stay Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 15, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANTs SOTHEBYS INTERNATIONAL REALTY and JEFFREY COSTALDO's Joinder To Defendant Kenneth Pages' Motion To Modify Stay Of Action DENIED as to non-settling defendants. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CIARAN O'SULLIVAN VS. WILBUR WOO AS TRUSTEE OF THE WOO FAMILY TRUST et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 15, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT WILBUR WOO AS TRUSTEE OF THE WOO FAMILY TRUST's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Statute of Limitations argument was withdrawn. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Plaintiff must exhaust administrative remedies before filing this action. SF Admin. Code 37.8 is not applicable to this case based on allegations in the First Amended Complaint; and is not mandatory. Advancing new theories in reply (i.e. availability of an adequate alternative relief) and reliance on unpublished opinions is improper. = (501/REQ)
